subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O Salamander of Fire, inasmuch as thou hast been enkindled by the Fire that hath appeared upon the Temple of the Chosen One in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فطوبی لک یا سمندر النار بما اشتعلت من نار التی ظهرت علی هیکل المختار فی هذه الایام
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
